summary: Iteration 2 backend testing complete. 25/25 pytest tests passing. All new endpoints (upload+storage, segment tracking + heatmap aggregation, transcript GET/POST, public file serving) verified end-to-end against the real Emergent object storage and real Whisper integration. Iteration 1 regression (auth + video CRUD + analytics) still 100% green.

minor.issue: When a missing path is requested, backend returns 502 (raised by requests.HTTPError chain) instead of a clean 404. Test accepts (404,500,502) but ideally should map upstream 404 -> 404. Minor — does not affect user flow.

action_items: (Optional, minor) In server.py serve_file, when upstream storage returns 404 ensure HTTPException(404) is raised (currently the requests.HTTPError flow may yield 502 in some cases).
(Carryover from iter 1) Add data-testid='record-create-button' to RecordModal CTA so frontend E2E can submit reliably.
(Carryover from iter 1) Decide logout redirect target (currently /login, spec said landing /).
critical_code_review_comments: transcribe_video correctly transitions transcript_status: pending -> ready/error and never leaves it stuck. Verified live with a fake webm (Whisper rejects format -> status becomes 'error' with truncated transcript_error). Good.
Storage initialization is lazy + auto-refreshes on 403 (storage_put/storage_get retry once after re-init). Confirmed Storage initialized on real Emergent endpoint.
upload_video reads entire file into memory (await file.read()) — fine for short recordings (<25MB Whisper cap) but consider streaming for larger files later. Also no max-size guard before reading.
/api/videos/{id}/segment is anonymous (intentional) and validates segment_index range (0..10000). Good.
Heatmap aggregation pipeline groups by segment_index and computes intensity = (watches + rewatches*2)/max_count — matches spec. Verified math (2 watches + 1 rewatch -> intensity 1.0 when max).
delete_video also deletes transcripts and segment_events — good cascade cleanup.
serve_file returns Cache-Control: public, max-age=3600 and proper media_type — allows <video src> to work. Good.
trigger_transcribe correctly 400s when storage_path missing and 200s + sets status=pending otherwise.
Transcript endpoint is per-user (404 for other users) — verified.
Minor: serve_file error mapping — requests.HTTPError handling could be tightened to map upstream 404 cleanly (currently can surface as 502 if requests raises before response status check).
test_credentials: Dynamically generated TEST_<uuid>@looma.app users each run. Bearer token from /auth/register used for protected endpoints.
seed_data_creation: Per-run: 2 TEST_ users, 1 TEST_video (deleted at end), 1 TEST_upload video left in DB with an uploaded ~8KB webm in Emergent object storage at looma/uploads/<user>/<uuid>.webm; 4 segment_events inserted for the TEST_video before deletion (cascaded out by delete_video).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers ALL endpoints incl. new iter-2 (upload, files, segment, heatmap, transcript GET, transcribe trigger). Whisper run with random webm bytes correctly returns transcript_status='error' (Whisper rejects invalid format — verified in backend.err.log). For a real-text transcript verification, upload a valid small mp3/webm clip via the same /api/videos/upload endpoint. For frontend testing, focus on Studio polling UI, VideoPlayer heatmap fetch, and RecordModal MediaRecorder flow (still needs data-testid on the submit CTA).
rca of the issue: No critical bugs found this iteration. The only minor item: when serving a non-existent storage path, the error response code can be 502 instead of 404 because requests.HTTPError handling in serve_file may not always have e.response (depends on upstream behavior). Mitigation: in serve_file, wrap storage_get and explicitly catch requests.HTTPError with r.response and map sc == 404 -> HTTPException(404), else 502.
